title: Anticlea mohinorensis
taxonomy: Anticlea mohinorensis is classified within the family Melanthiaceae, commonly known as the melanthium or mayapple family. This family consists of flowering plants native to the Northern Hemisphere. The genus Anticlea is a small group of flowering plants, and Anticlea mohinorensis is one of its species. The classification of Anticlea mohinorensis is further divided into its kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species. Specifically, its classification is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, class Liliopsida, order Liliales, family Melanthiaceae, genus Anticlea, and species A. mohinorensis.
